# Meeting Notes

Notes and decisions from the coaching sessions. You might also want to include notes from internal team meetings here, e.g. to document decisions that are relevant for the project and the development of the visualisation product. Sort in reverse chronological order (most recent first).


## 26.03.2026
notes:

Voraussetzungen für den Datensätze:
Möglichst ausgeglichene Menge an Daten pro
Altersgruppe:
•	Silent Generation: bis 1945
•	Babyboomers: bis 1964
•	Generation X: 1980
•	Millenials/ Generation Y: 1996
•	Generation Z: 2012

Pro themebereich 3 bis 5 features (oder KPI)


Topics:

* topic 1
* topic 2
* ...

Decisions:

* decision 1
* decision 2
* ...

Next steps:

* this
* and that
* ...

## 07.04.2022

Topics:

* topic 1
* topic 2
* ...

Decisions:

* decision 1
* decision 2
* ...

Next steps:

* this
* and that
* ...
